hero.headline:
Connecting knowledge,
bridging the world
hero.lede:
An international rights agency built on a decade of trust at Wisdom Cellar.
Bringing Korean stories to the world.

01.title: Global Copyright Agency
01.body: Bridging premium Korean publishing content with the global market.

02.title: Pioneering Emerging Markets
02.body: Opening Vietnam and Southeast Asia as the next growth markets.

03.title: One-Stop Localization Solution
03.body: Contracts, translation, and localization for seamless global publishing.

04.title: Strategic Global Partnership
04.body: Building long-term, trust-based networks with global publishers.

story.title:
From a small desk in Seoul
to 17 partner regions nationwide

wisdomseller.title: Wisdom Cellar
wisdomseller.body: Founded in 2013, Wisdom Cellar is a book distribution specialist that has supplied quality books to government agencies, schools, and military organizations. The trust built through public procurement platforms and tailored operations became Bookly's starting point.

bookly.title: Bookly
bookly.body: Established in April 2024. Leading the international business of the Wisdom Cellar ecosystem, uniting literature, webtoons, e-books, and audiobooks under one agency.

legacyTimeline.title: Built on trust, expanding across borders
legacyTimeline.description: Bookly's story is easier to follow as a journey than as a single paragraph. From Wisdom Cellar's operational foundation to cross-border content exchange, each step shows how that trust now scales.

trust.title: A Foundation of Trust
trust.body: Bookly is built on the experience of Wisdom Cellar, founded in 2013. For more than a decade, that foundation has earned trust by supplying books to government agencies, schools, and military organizations with strict standards.

operations.title: Transparent, Professional Operations
operations.body: Through official procurement platforms including KONEPS, the Defense e-Procurement System, and School Market, the company has maintained fair transactions while expanding into MARC data construction and specialized equipment services.

expansion.title: Bookly's Global Expansion
expansion.body: Bookly connects Korean authors and publishers with wider readerships across Asia, supporting books, eBooks, audiobooks, webtoons, and webnovels.

wisdomseller.name: Wisdom Cellar
wisdomseller.body: Our founding partner for book supply and rights — the origin of the group.

bookly.name: Bookly
bookly.body: Handles international rights representation, contracts, and royalty management for Korean authors and publishers.

vietnam.name: New venture entity
vietnam.body: An overseas base for Southeast Asian licensing and new business expansion.

showcase.subtitle: A rights agency connecting Korean authors with the global market. The next story begins where new discoveries and deep immersion meet.
